revision.comment: Adding [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia26]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia26]] to [[Category:Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Categories from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia27]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia27]] to [[Category:dd]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:tab went inactive so I need to add another category]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.text:
{{Short description|Reference How-to about Citation Styles and Access dates}} {{Wikipedia how to}}
Some editors find accessdates distracting. To hide the accessdate, edit [[Special:MyPage/common.css]]:
<syntaxhighlight lang="css"> span.reference-accessdate { display: none; } </syntaxhighlight>
To show a smaller access date: <syntaxhighlight lang="css"> span.reference-accessdate { font-size:80% } </syntaxhighlight>
[[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 4 ]] [[Category:Bump-01-21]] [[Category:tab went inactive so I need to add another Category]] [[Category:Bump-01-21]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 4]][[en:Citation Style 1/accessdate]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Citation Style 1/accessdate]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Citation Style 1/accessdate]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:New]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Tab went inactive so I need to add another Category]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Some editors find accessdates distracting. To hide the accessdate, edit [[Special:MyPage/common.css]]:
<syntaxhighlight lang="css"> span.reference-accessdate { display: none; } </syntaxhighlight>
To show a smaller access date: <syntaxhighlight lang="css"> span.reference-accessdate { font-size:80% } </syntaxhighlight>

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 4]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]] to [[Category:pages to be overwritten]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Help:Citation Style 1/accessdate]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Help:Citation Style 1/accessdate]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude>

#redirect[[en:Help:Citation Style 1/accessdate]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Help:Citation Style 1/accessdate]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Wikipedia overwrites
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Help:Citation Style 1/accessdate]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Help:Citation Style 1/accessdate]]</includeonly> <noinclude></noinclude>

revision.comment: removing these dumb broken links that cause problems
revision.text: redirect[[:en:Help:Citation Style 1/accessdate]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Help:Citation Style 1/accessdate]]</includeonly> <noinclude></noinclude>
